CursorStyle.AllowValues: Vanilla, xiaoshupaopao, shuopaopao, wangpaopao, lingpaopao, jiepaopao, shupaopao, jipaopao , yipaopao, nianpaopao, xipaopao, yupaopao, jiusepao

paopaoart.Description: If you want to see more DragonBeans, it's best not to turn this off :)

shupaopaorice.Name: shupaopaorice
shupaopaorice.Description: What? You're full? No, Shu Bean thinks you are not full yet. Just keep eating!

lingpaopaowine.Name: lingpaopaowine
lingpaopaowine.Description: An old Shang-Shu wine treasured by Ling Bean. Seems to have a strange taste...

yupaopaocook.Name: yupaopaocook
yupaopaocook.Description: The most popular dish sold at JieGarden. Also the little chef's specialty.

Entries.shupaopaohat: shupaopaohat/A small Shu Bean headpiece,looks like it's lying on your head./true/false//小Shu Bean headpiece/0/DragonBeans\Objects\shupaopaohat

Entries.xipaopaohat: xipaopaohat/A Dusk Bean headpiece,looks like it's lying on your head./true/false//Dusk Bean headpiece/0/DragonBeans\Objects\xipaopaohat

Entries.yupaopaohat: yupaopaohat/A Yu Bean headpiece,looks like it's lying on your head./true/false//Yu Bean headpiece/0/DragonBeans\Objects\yupaopaohat

nianpaopaoweapon.Name: nianpaopaoweapon
nianpaopaoweapon.Description: A sword materialized from Nian Bean. Has high defense and relatively fast attack speed, but unfortunately doesn't explode.

xipaopaoweapon.Name: xipaopaoweapon
xipaopaoweapon.Description: A dagger materialized from Dusk Bean. Because Dusk Bean is afraid of monsters, she doesn't want any monsters to get close. Effectively repels flying monsters.

shuopaopaoweapon.Name: shuopaopaoweapon
shuopaopaoweapon.Description: A hammer materialized from Shuo Bean, imbues you with the martial power of Sui Monster.

wangpaopaoweapon.Name: wangpaopaoweapon
wangpaopaoweapon.Description: A sword materialized from Wang Bean, possesses a sword aura that can attack from very far away.

wangpaopaoegg.Name: wangpaopaoegg
wangpaopaoegg.Description: Wang Bean's Clone Egg, represents 'Family'. Produces a A Wang Bean's Clone.

lingpaopaoegg.Name: lingpaopaoegg
lingpaopaoegg.Description: Ling Bean's egg, represents 'Freedom'. Hatches into a Ling Bean overnight.

shupaopaoegg.Name: shupaopaoegg
shupaopaoegg.Description: Shu Bean's egg, represents 'Care'. Hatches into a Shu Bean overnight.

jipaopaoegg.Name: jipaopaoegg
jipaopaoegg.Description: Ji Bean's egg, represents 'Wealth'. Hatches into a Ji Bean overnight.

yipaopaoegg.Name: yipaopaoegg
yipaopaoegg.Description: Yi Bean's egg, represents 'Cherish'. Hatches into a Yi Bean overnight.

nianpaopaoegg.Name: nianpaopaoegg
nianpaopaoegg.Description: Nian Bean's egg, painted over by Nian with low-quality pigment, represents... 'Remember to come support my next new movie!'. Hatches into a Nian Bean overnight.

xipaopaoegg.Name: xipaopaoegg
xipaopaoegg.Description: A Dusk Bean egg sculpture artwork, where Dusk Bean discarded the 'spirit' from her own egg, making it her most powerful artwork.

yupaopaoegg.Name: yupaopaoegg
yupaopaoegg.Description: Yu Bean's egg, represents 'Reunion'. Hatches into a small Yu Bean overnight.

familyandresponsibilities.Name: familyandresponsibilities
familyandresponsibilities.Description: A Dusk Bean egg sculpture artwork. Made under the guidance of Shu Bean.

thejiegardenthree.Name: thejiegardenthree
thejiegardenthree.Description: A Dusk Bean egg sculpture artwork. Originates from Dusk Bean's experience after not playing well at JieGarden. Compared to other works, it probably won't sell well.

suifamilysisters.Name: suifamilysisters
suifamilysisters.Description: A Dusk Bean egg sculpture artwork. Made because Nian Bean and Ling Bean insisted.

DragonBeans.shuopaopao.ShopDescription: Shuo Bean, a kungfu Bean. Shuo Bean is very strong, gives you fish he catches every two days. Occasionally teaches you tactical skills, and can also produce all DragonBeans eggs.

DragonBeans.wangpaopao.ShopDescription: Wang Bean, a strategist Bean. Has countless clones in the human world. Teaches you a piece of strategic knowledge every six days.
DragonBeans.wangpaopao.ShopMissingBuildingDescription: Wang Bean clone wants Coop to cultivate strategy, maybe for playing weiqi?
DragonBeans.wangpaopao.BirthText: A new Wang Bean clone has appeared!

DragonBeans.lingpaopao.ShopDescription: Ling Bean, a Bean who loves drinking. Shares the wine she drinks with you. Shares a bottle of wine every two days.
DragonBeans.lingpaopao.ShopMissingBuildingDescription: Ling Bean wants Coop to hide and store her wine!

DragonBeans.shupaopao.ShopDescription: Shu Bean, a Bean who loves growing vegetables, Goddess of Tilled Land. Shu Bean gives you some crops as a gift every two days.
DragonBeans.shupaopao.ShopMissingBuildingDescription: Shu Bean wants Coop to settle down.

DragonBeans.jipaopao.ShopDescription: Ji Bean, a merchant Bean. Gives you his treasures and cloth every day.
DragonBeans.jipaopao.ShopMissingBuildingDescription: Ji Bean wants Coop to hide his treasures.

DragonBeans.yipaopao.ShopDescription: Yi Bean, an architect Bean. Gives you materials needed for farm construction every day.
DragonBeans.yipaopao.ShopMissingBuildingDescription: Yi Bean wants Coop to draw blueprints.

DragonBeans.nianpaopao.ShopDescription: Nian Bean, a Bean who loves spicy food and movies. Gives you peppers every two days. Uh... so spicy! Wait, are those movie tickets under Nian Bean?
DragonBeans.nianpaopao.ShopMissingBuildingDescription: Nian Bean wants Coop... or maybe we should separate Dusk and Nian...

DragonBeans.xipaopao.ShopDescription: Dusk Bean, a Bean switched love to egg sculpting. Gives you her artwork every half month.
DragonBeans.xipaopao.ShopMissingBuildingDescription: Dusk Bean... seems to want more space? Let her live in the Barn.

DragonBeans.yupaopao.ShopDescription: Yu Bean, a Bean who loves cooking. Cooks a meal for you every day.
DragonBeans.yupaopao.ShopMissingBuildingDescription: Yu Bean wants Coop to cook.
DragonBeans.yupaopao.BirthText: A small Yu Bean has born!

DragonBeans.jiusepao.ShopDescription: A rare Bean that ordinary people cannot find. But when you are willing to search with huge gold, she will come before you and help you with items of equal value. Gives you one Prismatic Shard and one Magic Rock Candy every day.
DragonBeans.jiusepao.BirthText: Strange, it seems a very rare Bean has appeared here...
